translations.en: My nephew is arriving this weekend.
translations.es: Mi sobrino llega este fin de semana.
translations.it: Mio nipote arriva questo fine settimana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的侄子这个周末要来。
translations.yue: 我個侄仔呢個週末會嚟。
translations.ru: Мой племянник приедет в эти выходные.
translations.pt: Meu sobrinho chega neste fim de semana.
translations.vi: Cháu trai của tôi sẽ đến vào cuối tuần này.
translations.ar: ابن أخي سيأتي في نهاية هذا الأسبوع.
translations.hu: Az unokaöcsém ezen a hétvégén érkezik.
translations.hi: मेरा भतीजा इस सप्ताहांत आ रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój siostrzeniec przyjeżdża w ten weekend.
translations.el: Ο ανιψιός μου έρχεται αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.id: Keponakan saya akan datang akhir pekan ini.
translations.ro: Nepotul meu sosește în acest weekend.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular, modifies the noun 'neveu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; syntactic subject of the verb 'arrive'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular, agrees with 'neveu'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'week-end' in a temporal NP.
Common noun functioning as a temporal adjunct specifying when the arrival occurs.

translations.de: Du passt morgen auf meinen Neffen auf.
translations.it: Domani ti occupi di mio nipote.
translations.ko: 내일은 네가 내 조카를 봐줄 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你明天要照看我的侄子。
translations.yue: 你聽日要幫我睇住我個侄仔。
translations.ru: Ты завтра присмотришь за моим племянником.
translations.pt: Você vai cuidar do meu sobrinho amanhã.
translations.he: מחר אתה שומר על האחיין שלי.
translations.vi: Ngày mai bạn sẽ trông cháu trai của tôi.
translations.nl: Jij past morgen op mijn neefje.
translations.uk: Ти завтра приглянеш за моїм племінником.
translations.hi: तुम कल मेरे भतीजे की देखभाल करोगे.
translations.el: Αύριο θα προσέχεις τον ανιψιό μου.
translations.nb: Du passer nevøen min i morgen.
translations.sv: I morgon passar du min brorson.
translations.ro: Mâine ai grijă de nepotul meu.
translations.da: I morgen passer du min nevø.
translations.ja: 明日、あなたは私の甥の面倒を見る。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular, modifies 'neveu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (patient) of 'gardes'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate to indicate time.

sentences.target: Nous emmenons notre neveu au parc.

translations.fr: Nous emmenons notre neveu au parc.
translations.en: We’re taking our nephew to the park.
translations.es: Llevamos a nuestro sobrino al parque.
translations.de: Wir nehmen unseren Neffen mit in den Park.
translations.yue: 我哋帶我哋個侄仔去公園。
translations.ru: Мы ведём нашего племянника в парк.
translations.he: אנחנו לוקחים את האחיין שלנו לפארק.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đưa cháu trai của mình đến công viên.
translations.ar: نحن نأخذ ابن أخينا إلى الحديقة.
translations.nl: We nemen ons neefje mee naar het park.
translations.uk: Ми ведемо нашого племінника до парку.
translations.hi: हम अपने भतीजे को पार्क ले जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Παίρνουμε τον ανιψιό μας στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Vi tar med nevøen vår til parken.
translations.id: Kami mengajak keponakan kami ke taman.
translations.sv: Vi tar med vår brorson till parken.
translations.ro: Îl ducem pe nepotul nostru în parc.
translations.da: Vi tager vores nevø med i parken.
translations.ja: 私たちは甥を公園に連れて行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; denotes taking someone somewhere.
Possessive determiner (1st person plural), masculine singular, modifies 'neveu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'emmenons'.
Prepositional contraction (à + le) introducing a goal/location PP ('au parc').
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au', destination of the movement.

sentences.target: Je dois acheter un cadeau pour mon neveu.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa aʃəte œ̃ kado puʁ mɔ̃ nəvø/

translations.fr: Je dois acheter un cadeau pour mon neveu.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa aʃəte œ̃ kado puʁ mɔ̃ nəvø/
translations.en: I need to buy a present for my nephew.
translations.es: Tengo que comprar un regalo para mi sobrino.
translations.de: Ich muss ein Geschenk für meinen Neffen kaufen.
translations.it: Devo comprare un regalo per mio nipote.
translations.ko: 내 조카에게 줄 선물을 사야 해.
translations.yue: 我要買份禮物畀我個侄仔。
translations.ru: Мне нужно купить подарок для моего племянника.
translations.pt: Eu preciso comprar um presente para o meu sobrinho.
translations.he: אני צריך לקנות מתנה לאחיין שלי.
translations.tr: Yeğenim için bir hediye almam gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Tôi cần mua một món quà cho cháu trai của tôi.
translations.ar: أحتاج أن أشتري هدية لابن أخي.
translations.nl: Ik moet een cadeau kopen voor mijn neefje.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно купити подарунок для мого племінника.
translations.hi: मुझे अपने भतीजे के लिए एक उपहार खरीदना है.
translations.pl: Muszę kupić prezent dla mojego siostrzeńca.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αγοράσω ένα δώρο για τον ανιψιό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg må kjøpe en gave til nevøen min.
translations.id: Saya perlu membeli hadiah untuk keponakan saya.
translations.sv: Jag behöver köpa en present till min brorson.
translations.ro: Trebuie să cumpăr un cadou pentru nepotul meu.
translations.cs: Musím koupit dárek pro svého synovce.
translations.da: Jeg skal købe eine gave til min nevø.
translations.ja: 甥にプレゼントを買わなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the sentence.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses obligation on the infinitive 'acheter'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'dois'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, modifies 'cadeau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'acheter'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary PP ('pour mon neveu').
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular, modifies 'neveu'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour' (beneficiary).
